rule: This delta supersedes stale states and percentages only where the listed merged evidence proves a bounded state transition. Parent missions remain open until their full exit gates pass.

merged_evidence.scope: Command Centre history and alert persistence
bounded intelligence, routing and Apex agent contracts
measured ChatHub source pack and role-aware intake
dependency-free local runtime and bounded deterministic staging slices

task_state_corrections.scope: Repository-side topology, IAM, policy, audit, alerts, recovery contracts and deterministic tests; connected infrastructure remains unproven.
Deterministic source/evidence ranking, free-first routing and capability quarantine; current connected acquisition schedules remain unproven.
Shared local governance, knowledge, routing, security, UX and integration contracts; complete connected shared-core runtime remains open.
Bounded deterministic read-only CFO scenario slice only.
Bounded research-only XRP/HBAR holdings and scenario slice only.
Bounded paper-order and position-risk slice only; full backtest/walk-forward factory remains open.
Bounded agency unit-economics slice only; demand, CRM and delivery runtime remain open.
Bounded SaaS staging gate only; product lifecycle, billing and publication remain open.

fully_completed_bounded_scopes: Accessible five-repository inventory and source-level federation contracts
ChatHub supplied source-pack measurement and role-aware parsing
Bounded CFO, XRP/HBAR, paper-trading, agency and SaaS staging slices
Repository-wide CI and full-history security verification for PR 81

additional_work_fully_executable_now.name: Expanded bounded domain services
deliverables: CFO entity and immutable ledger fixtures

additional_work_fully_executable_now.name: Accessible source batches
deliverables: process each currently available archive/file as a separately counted batch
preserve missing files as PENDING_INGEST or BLOCKED_BY_ACCESS

hard_blocks.reason: Authoritative Railway domain and provider configuration
Google Apps Script, Sheet and Railway configuration
Provider workflow dispatch and runtime result
Protected host identity and authorised canary source
Connected staging endpoints and vault-held signing references
Missing or opaque source bytes prevent universal source completion
Owner approval, provider accounts, costs and production secrets
All prior tasks plus explicit owner acceptance

truth_boundary: All percentages and completion claims must name their denominator. Whole-program 100 percent remains impossible until missing sources, connected staging, production and owner acceptance gates are resolved.
